Plugin.Name: Komodo Periphery
Plugin.Description: Run Komodo Periphery directly on Unraid as a native host service. The plugin keeps configuration under /boot/config/plugins/komodo-periphery and persistent Komodo state under /boot/config/komodo/periphery so updates do not rotate keys or lose onboarding.
Plugin.Requires: No external plugin dependencies. Docker is optional for Komodo-managed workloads, but the plugin itself runs natively on the Unraid host.
